1.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, objid, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%';

1.description: get Trondheim kommunenummer and geometry from kommuner.kommune

2.description: get fylke geometries and names to find the county containing Trondheim

3.description: find which fylke contains Trondheim municipality (join kommuner -> fylke)

4.description: select quick-clay release areas (utlosningomr) that have a 'high' skredrisikokvikkleireklasse by matching lookup descriptions and return their geometries

5.description: reduce quick-clay high-risk areas to those intersecting Trondheim municipality (join kvikkleire -> kommune)

6.description: get parcels (teig) in Trondheim with area > 5000 m2

7.description: find parcels that intersect the reduced high-risk quick-clay areas (join teig -> kvikkleire reduced)

8.description: collapse to one row per parcel and keep area as metric
